steps.title: Contrast the two text positions
steps.content: Text 1 argues the show is outdated and should no longer be produced. Text 2 agrees it feels outdated but says it should be kept because it is popular, profitable, and adaptable through updates like the Hot Chocolate Nutcracker.

steps.title: Choose the option matching revision
steps.content: Choice B incorrectly assumes audiences have stopped going. Choice C adds a claim about most companies increasing income, which is unsupported. Choice A says Text 2 rejects the need for an updated production, which contradicts the passage. Choice D names the core response: keep the show but revise it. The answer is D.
